Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTs ERIN FERRELL and PETS ARE WONDERFUL SUPPORT'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damage Allegations From Pltf'S 2nd Amended Complaint -- granted. This is without prejudice to plaintiff's right to move for leave to file an amended complaint should discovery develop facts that would support such an action.
